use_cases: Landing page headers with animated entrance effects for marketing sites
Product showcase sections with glass-morphism styling and call-to-action buttons
Dark-themed hero banners with parallax-like layered animations
ai_summary: An animated hero section component featuring glass-morphism styling with backdrop blur effects, dark gradient overlays, and staggered entrance animations using Framer Motion. Includes configurable navigation, logo slot, dual CTA buttons, and fully responsive layout suitable for landing pages across SaaS, e-commerce, and media platforms.
